records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Please be aware that a sandstorm accompanied by strong Corruption rays is expected today.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Please be aware that a sandstorm accompanied by strong Corruption rays is expected today.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Please be aware that a sandstorm accompanied by strong Corruption rays is expected today.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Also note that all communications will be cut off during the sandstorm.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Also note that all communications will be cut off during the sandstorm.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Also note that all communications will be cut off during the sandstorm.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I repeat...</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I repeat...</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I repeat...</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hello?! Is anyone inside?! Please, save me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hello?! Is anyone inside?! Please, save me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hello?! Is anyone inside?! Please, save me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... I'm being chased by pirates!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... I'm being chased by pirates!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... I'm being chased by pirates!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon, I told you it's no use.
records.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon, I told you it's no use.
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon, I told you it's no use.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lotus is like the gathering place for all kinds of human trash.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lotus is like the gathering place for all kinds of human trash.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lotus is like the gathering place for all kinds of human trash.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the crazy one for stepping into such a place without any precaution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the crazy one for stepping into such a place without any precaution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the crazy one for stepping into such a place without any precaution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! How 'bout we open her head instead of selling her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! How 'bout we open her head instead of selling her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! How 'bout we open her head instead of selling her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll check how messed up she really is!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll check how messed up she really is!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll check how messed up she really is!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wasn't it your idea to grab her and sell her in the first place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wasn't it your idea to grab her and sell her in the first place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wasn't it your idea to grab her and sell her in the first place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that I think of it, it was my left brain just mumbling on its own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that I think of it, it was my left brain just mumbling on its own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that I think of it, it was my left brain just mumbling on its own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But who'll ever buy a weakling like her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But who'll ever buy a weakling like her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But who'll ever buy a weakling like her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aren't all our clients rich people who want to have Counters as slaves?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aren't all our clients rich people who want to have Counters as slaves?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aren't all our clients rich people who want to have Counters as slaves?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are more rich folk who have weird tastes than you might think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are more rich folk who have weird tastes than you might think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are more rich folk who have weird tastes than you might think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quit your dumb thoughts and go grab her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quit your dumb thoughts and go grab her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quit your dumb thoughts and go grab her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She ran into a collapsed building, so it should be an easy catch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She ran into a collapsed building, so it should be an easy catch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She ran into a collapsed building, so it should be an easy catch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... Just my luck. Why did it have to be Scavengers...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... Just my luck. Why did it have to be Scavengers...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... Just my luck. Why did it have to be Scavengers...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a mistake to come to Lotus blindly!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a mistake to come to Lotus blindly!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a mistake to come to Lotus blindly!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the needle was pointing here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the needle was pointing here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the needle was pointing here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* Now's not the time for this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* Now's not the time for this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* Now's not the time for this...

records.m_Talk_ENG:
If I don't lose those pirates
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
If I don't lose those pirates
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
If I don't lose those pirates
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eeeek! That scared me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eeeek! That scared me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eeeek! That scared me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought a wall would suddenly open...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought a wall would suddenly open...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought a wall would suddenly open...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The compass needle is pointing to a spot...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The compass needle is pointing to a spot...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The compass needle is pointing to a spot...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Playing hide-and-seek, se95orita? Count me in!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Playing hide-and-seek, se95orita? Count me in!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Playing hide-and-seek, se95orita? Count me in!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll count to ten, so you'd better hide well!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll count to ten, so you'd better hide well!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll count to ten, so you'd better hide well!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you say, right hand? You'll wrap her up nicely if she gets caught? Nice!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you say, right hand? You'll wrap her up nicely if she gets caught? Nice!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you say, right hand? You'll wrap her up nicely if she gets caught? Nice!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... I'd rather jump in here than get sold to pirates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... I'd rather jump in here than get sold to pirates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... I'd rather jump in here than get sold to pirates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmpf!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmpf!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmpf!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... It's a lot cleaner than I expected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... It's a lot cleaner than I expected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... It's a lot cleaner than I expected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what is this place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what is this place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what is this place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the machinery devices are connected to that thing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the machinery devices are connected to that thing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the machinery devices are connected to that thing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will I be able to lose those pirates if I hide among these devices?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will I be able to lose those pirates if I hide among these devices?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will I be able to lose those pirates if I hide among these devices?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Se95orita? Come out, come out wherever you are...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Se95orita? Come out, come out wherever you are...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Se95orita? Come out, come out wherever you are...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-they're going to catch me if I don't do anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-they're going to catch me if I don't do anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-they're going to catch me if I don't do anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I need to find a way... Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I need to find a way... Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I need to find a way... Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is... this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is... this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is... this...?
